goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'peterborough' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should 'arrive by 15:15'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should go to peterborough and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on thursday and should arrive by 15:15
Make sure you get train ID and departure time
